description: Pre-computed means and standard deviations from TCGA HGSOC discovery cohort (hgsoc_tcga_gdc). Used as default z-scoring reference when custom cohort is not provided.

SLC22A1.note: Computed from GDC HGSOC tpm_unstranded (ENSG00000175003). Not in agentic expression subset; extracted directly from GDC cache.
